title: ilex cassine var. mexicana
intro: Ilex cassine var. mexicana, also known as the Yaupon Holly or Yaupon Tea Plant, is a variety of holly native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, particularly in the regions of Texas, Arizona, and New Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex cassine var. mexicana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Ilex cassine var. mexicana typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed as a beverage or used as a base for other herbal remedies.
